revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月廿七]][[zh:八月廿七]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 27|qq=August 27}}
<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}} . == Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenji|en|Emperor Tenji|qid=Q314802|lt=Emperor Tenchi|1=Emperor Tenji}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|663|en|663|qid=Q31122|lt=663|1=663}} {{ill|October 4|en|October 4|qid=Q2929|lt=October 4|1=October 4}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Baekgang|en|Battle of Baekgang|qid=Q608727|lt=Battle of Hakusamura|1=Battle of Baekgang}} * {{ill|Nin'an|en|Nin'an|qid=Q3577285|lt=Ninan|1=Nin'an}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1166|en|1166|qid=Q19677|lt=1166|1=1166}} {{ill|September 23|en|September 23|qid=Q2888|lt=September 23|1=September 23}} ) – For the accession of {{ill|Emperor Rokujō|en|Emperor Rokujō|qid=Q357046|lt=Emperor Rokujō|1=Emperor Rokujō}} , the era name was changed from {{ill|Eiman|en|Eiman|qid=Q1193868|lt=Eiman|1=Eiman}} to {{ill|Nin'an|en|Nin'an|qid=Q3577285|lt=Ninan|1=Nin'an}} through an {{ill|era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|en|Gentoku|qid=Q1327385|lt=Gentoku|1=Gentoku}} 3rd year/ {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|qid=Q1194556|lt=Genkō|1=Genkō (1331–1334)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1331|en|1331|qid=Q6000|lt=1331|1=1331}} {{ill|September 29|en|September 29|qid=Q2882|lt=September 29|1=September 29}} ) – {{ill|Genkō Incident|ja|元弘の変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genkō Incident|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 元弘の乱|1=Genkō War|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1432624}} : After a plot to overthrow the government was uncovered, {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|qid=Q313942|lt=Emperor Go-Daigo|1=Emperor Go-Daigo}} fled with the {{ill|Imperial Regalia|ja|神器|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Regalia|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 三種の神器|1=Imperial Regalia of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q327465}} to {{ill|Nara|ja|奈良|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nara|qq=}} and {{ill|Mount Kasagi|en|Mount Kasagi|qid=Q11599951|lt=Kasagiyama|1=Mount Kasagi}} . * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1573|en|1573|qid=Q6678|lt=1573|1=1573}} {{ill|September 23|en|September 23|qid=Q2888|lt=September 23|1=September 23}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} attacked {{ill|Odani Castle|en|Odani Castle|qid=Q2436937|lt=Kotani Castle|1=Odani Castle}} in Ōmi ({{ill|Ōmi Province|en|Ōmi Province|qid=Q843882|lt=Ōmi|1=Ōmi Province}} ), the stronghold of {{ill|Azai Nagamasa|en|Azai Nagamasa|qid=Q1142446|lt=Asai Nagamasa|1=Azai Nagamasa}} , to which his sister {{ill|Oichi|en|Oichi|qid=Q635214|lt=Oichi|1=Oichi}} was betrothed. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|October 12|en|October 12|qid=Q2920|lt=October 12|1=October 12}} ) – At the {{ill|Kyoto Imperial Palace|en|Kyoto Imperial Palace|qid=Q1202239|lt=Kyoto Imperial Palace|1=Kyoto Imperial Palace}} , the grand enthronement ceremony for {{ill|Emperor Meiji|en|Emperor Meiji|qid=Q174231|lt=Emperor Meiji|1=Emperor Meiji}} was held. == Births == * {{ill|King Ling of Zhou|en|King Ling of Zhou|qid=Q887580|lt=King Ling|1=King Ling of Zhou}} 20th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|551 BC|ja|紀元前551|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/551 BC|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135503387|1=551 BC}} {{ill|September 28|en|September 28|qid=Q2883|lt=September 28|1=September 28}} ) – {{ill|Confucius|en|Confucius|qid=Q4604|lt=Confucius|1=Confucius}} , philosopher and founder of {{ill|Confucianism|en|Confucianism|qid=Q9581|lt=Confucianism|1=Confucianism}} (d. {{ill|479 BC|ja|紀元前479|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/479 BC|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135503389|1=479 BC}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1838|en|1838|qid=Q7612|lt=1838|1=1838}} {{ill|October 15|en|October 15|qid=Q2919|lt=October 15|1=October 15}} ) – {{ill|Ueno Hikoma|en|Ueno Hikoma|qid=Q600541|lt=Ueno Hikoma|1=Ueno Hikoma}} , photographer (d. {{ill|1904|en|1904|qid=Q2046|lt=1904|1=1904}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Ten'an|en|Ten'an|qid=Q1075611|lt=Tenan|1=Ten'an}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|858|en|858|qid=Q30371|lt=858|1=858}} {{ill|October 7|en|October 7|qid=Q2926|lt=October 7|1=October 7}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Montoku|en|Emperor Montoku|qid=Q357225|lt=Emperor Buntoku|1=Emperor Montoku}} , 55th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor|1=Emperor of Japan}} . * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|en|Shōtoku (era)|qid=Q1193848|lt=Shōtoku|1=Shōtoku (era)}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1714|en|1714|qid=Q6878|lt=1714|1=1714}} {{ill|October 5|en|October 5|qid=Q2930|lt=October 5|1=October 5}} ) – {{ill|Kaibara Ekken|en|Kaibara Ekken|qid=Q1721396|lt=Kaihara Ekken|1=Kaibara Ekken}} , Confucian scholar (b. {{ill|1630|en|1630|qid=Q6856|lt=1630|1=1630}} ).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|26|8|28|7|27|9|8|0827|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 8월 27일]] [[ja:8月27日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:八月廿七]]
